description: The treasurer for a political campaign is filing a quarterly campaign finance disclosure report.

nodes.task_description: Identify the political committee and the correct reporting period.

expected_outcome.value: The treasurer selects their committee and the correct quarter.

nodes.task_description: Input all contributions and expenditures for the period.

expected_outcome.value: The treasurer accurately enters all financial data into the online form.

nodes.task_description: Submit the report to the state ethics commission.

expected_outcome.value: The treasurer successfully files the report by the deadline.
